h: Medicaid cancelling policy. Any advice?
snippet: pamstegma: Income: bring pay stubs for at least 3 months, including unemployment benefits you collect or disability payments. Include tax refunds you got. Rent: bring PROOF of rental payments to parents. Of course they declare the rental income on their tax return, that's a proof. Very significant item, since Medicaid will count you all as one household without that proof. (likes): (0)
